ranked_actions.reason: Lifts conversion before scaling more traffic into the funnel.
Scales awareness quickly but can increase CAC and competitive pressure.
Improves positioning by narrowing focus and lowering competitive pressure.
Rebalances acquisition toward healthier channels and improves marketing efficiency.
Cuts complexity to improve readiness and reduce launch risk.
Tests the market with lower timing risk before a broader release.
Buys time to improve readiness when product or timing risk is too high.

alerts.title: A paid or owned channel is underperforming
alerts.message: Direct shows 99.6% weakness probability. Rebalance channel mix before scaling spend.

notes: Competitor nodes resolved to real-world players for category 'electronics'.
Dataset brand proxies are still available in 'brand_proxy_competitors' and drive the brand / competitor proxy watchlist.
Archive scores are learned by an offline reinforcement-style policy search over monthly dataset episodes.
Each archive heuristic uses a wider feature set spanning events, campaigns, transactions, products, and customers.
Predictive ML checkpoints and RL policy checkpoints are stored under the models directory during archive scenario generation.
